column1: Luis Arraez leads the slate with elite consistency, hitting safely in over 76% of games and batting leadoff with the platoon edge against Seth Lugo. Jake McCarthy is also appealing atop the Rockies’ order, benefiting from a favorable home park and a soft matchup with Cade Cavalli. Shohei Ohtani and Freddie Freeman offer reliability in the top third of the lineup, but Arraez’s steady approach and strong track record make him the top pick for Beat The Streak.
